title: Hairy Zombies
description: 🧶 Adds Hairy Zombies to your game
body:
Hairy Zombies is a simple mod, adding a new zombie type

![render](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/703870953222045717/1024263409329504276/zombie_render.png)

The new Hairy Zombies are a new zombie subtype, dropping strings and rotten flesh on death, allowing your zombies farm to produce strings too. They are also fire immune, so they won't burn in the sunlight. They don't spawn naturally, but instead have a probability to spawn instead of a regular zombie when they spawn (the probability can be edited in the config file, the default value is 5%).

You can also rename them "FuzeIII" to get a special skin (a reference to how the French Youtuber FuzeIII is getting moqued for never cutting his hair ;D)

- [Showcase Video](https://youtu.be/DXR4jWbm8IQ)
- Need more information ? Check the [Curseforge Page](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/hairy-zombies)
